synopsis: Evangel Presbytery referred a matter to the Standing Judicial Commission for adjudication (Case 2002-04). The SJC did not accede to the request to accept and act upon the judicial reference.
notes: Confirmed from corpus: ga31_2003 pdf-p95 (printed 93) lists '2002-04 Judicial Reference from Evangel Presbytery for Adjudication'; the SJC report summary (pdf-p595) records 'Not acceded to by the SJC.'
